text.title: Product Analytics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Product Analytics end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: define-nsm
step.action: Pick the single metric tied to delivered value.

step.name: dashboard
step.action: Build dashboard mirroring the plan; ≤7 charts.

step.name: review
step.action: Weekly review; capture decisions in hypothesis log.
